# Daily Report ‚Äî 2026-07-21

## Task Completed
Added `close_request` tool to `request_tools.py`. The tool patches the `sc_request` table
with `state=4` (Closed Complete), accepts either a REQ number or 32-char sys_id, and
optionally appends `close_notes` and `work_notes`. Includes a 404 guard and the standard
`_resolve_request_sys_id` helper for number‚Üísys_id resolution. Registered in `__init__.py`,
`tool_utils.py`, `tool_packages.yaml` (service_desk and full packages). 12 new tests added
to `test_request_tools.py`.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 2374
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Known vulnerabilities in system-level packages (setuptools, urllib3, wheel) ‚Äî unrelated to
project code. No issues in servicenow-mcp itself.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` ‚Äî import `CloseRequestParams`, `close_request_tool`; registry entry
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` ‚Äî added `close_request` to service_desk and full packages
- `tests/test_request_tools.py` ‚Äî 12 new tests for close_request
